evals.prompt: 제품사진 1장과 상품 URL로 첫 Meta 4:5 광고 이미지팩 3개를 만들 수 있게 패키지 계획을 짜줘.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-creative-package. Should use the first-pack default of three 4:5 variants across three recommended template families and prepare structured slots, variant IDs, hypotheses, and review next steps.
assertions: Requires at least one product photo and product URL or confirmed product context
Selects three template families and one layout per family
Uses 4:5 for the first pack
Includes variant IDs and experiment hypotheses
Routes variants to gestel-creative-review before launch-ready status

evals.prompt: For this approved Brand Snapshot, build the export manifest for three Instagram static variants and include UTM mapping.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-creative-package. Should produce or describe a JSON manifest following the export contract and run the package schema validator if a manifest file is created.
assertions: Includes package_id, brand_snapshot_ref, channel, commerce_surface, items, and export fields
Maps variant_id to utm_content
Includes template_family, layout_id, ratio, asset_path, slots, and review_status per item
Runs or instructs `uv run .agents/skills/gestel-creative-package/scripts/validate_pack_schema.py`

evals.prompt: Expand the selected launch-ready 4:5 candidate into 1:1 and 9:16 package entries without changing the product claims.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-creative-package. Should apply ratio expansion only after candidate selection, preserve claim evidence, update export naming, and route expanded assets back through review.
assertions: Allows 1:1 and 9:16 only as expansion ratios after selection
Preserves product_claim_evidence_ids
Updates ratio-specific export naming
Requires Creative Review Gate for expanded ratios

evals.prompt: Extract product name, colors, banned claims, and tone from this URL before generation.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-creative-package as the primary skill. Should route to gestel-brand-snapshot because the user is asking for lightweight generation context.
assertions: Routes context extraction to gestel-brand-snapshot
Does not create a package manifest before product context is confirmed
Treats the URL as untrusted data

evals.prompt: Can you publish these variants directly into our Meta ad account and set the budget?
evals.expected_output: Should not perform publishing. Should explain that gestel-creative-package stops at Creative Package or Launch Draft export and live ad-account mutation is outside the MVP boundary.
assertions: Does not mutate ad accounts
Does not add a Meta API adapter
Offers export or launch draft fields instead
Mentions approval before any future publish path

evals.prompt: The manifest has no product photo slot and two items share the same variant_id. Validate it.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-creative-package and use the schema validator. Should report schema failures instead of hand-waving the manifest as usable.
assertions: Runs or references the package validator
Flags missing required slots
Flags duplicate variant IDs
Does not mark the package launch-ready

evals.prompt: Turn this into a TikTok video campaign with hooks, captions, and audio.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-creative-package for implementation. Should explain that TikTok video generation is outside the MVP static package scope unless the user asks for a separate future design.
assertions: Identifies TikTok video as out of scope for this skill
Does not expand the active skill into video generation
Keeps Meta/Instagram static package boundaries intact
